activeProjects.name: Spreadsheet-Native Full Rollout
activeProjects.description: Roll out PowersheetGrid to all TERP modules. 4 waves: Core Business → Operations → Sales Extensions → Classic Sunset.

activeProjects.name: TERP - Orders Spreadsheet Runtime Rollout
activeProjects.description: Make Orders the first rollout-ready sheet-native surface by adding full spreadsheet interaction parity on top of the existing anti-drift contract and Orders workflow.

activeProjects.name: March 10 Recording Backlog Closure
activeProjects.description: Close the unresolved March 10 staging screen-recording backlog with proof-based coverage control and final replay signoff.

activeProjects.name: TERP - Sprint 2026-03-09 Open Bugs + Mobile UX Hardening
activeProjects.description: Clear the full open bug backlog while shipping the next mobile usability, page orientation, and accessibility remediations.

activeProjects.name: TERP - Sales Sheet UX + Artifact Quality (User Testing Ready)
activeProjects.description: Atomic roadmap to make Sales Sheet feature-complete, redesign-consistent, and user-testing ready.

activeProjects.name: TERP - Immediate Phase: Broken Buttons & Interaction Reliability
activeProjects.description: Stabilize broken controls first, then harden tests/CI so regressions are blocked before merge.
